Address.confirmDeleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

DeleteAccount.title: Account deletion
DeleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your APP-NAME account and all personal data. This action is irreversible. Please ensure you complete necessary tasks such as saving important information or handling pending matters before deletion.

Setting.title: Settings
Setting.description: Manage your APP-NAME account easily and securely! Change your login password with one click — we recommend using a strong password with letters, numbers and symbols and updating it regularly; set a separate transaction password to protect sensitive operations; update your delivery address to ensure smooth notifications and deliveries. Simple operations for peace of mind!

LoginPassword.title: Login password
LoginPassword.description: Change or reset your password. We recommend using a strong password with letters, numbers and symbols and updating regularly to protect account security.
LoginPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
LoginPassword.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match

PayPassword.title: Transaction password
PayPassword.description: Set a transaction password separate from your login password for confirming auctions, withdrawals and other operations to enhance transaction security.
PayPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
PayPassword.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match

Withdraw.description: Supports multiple payout channels, processes withdrawal requests quickly and securely in compliance with regulations.

Deposit.description: Fast and stable deposits with a simple and smooth process — top up your account anytime for peace of mind.

Footer.description: APP-NAME global users come from 112 countries and settle via USDT/ETH/BTC. USDT/ETH/BTC provides borderless transactions with near-instant, low-cost transfers worldwide — no waiting, no international fees.

ProductDetailMain.shippingDesc: Orders are shipped within 24 hours. If there are logistics controls, delivery may be delayed. Please check order tracking or contact customer service.

DeliveryInformation.title: Where do we deliver?
DeliveryInformation.desc1: To check if we deliver to your area, enter your postal code on the product page you want to buy.
DeliveryInformation.desc2: Products are shipped directly from our suppliers and our global warehouses cover 112 countries/regions.

pickup.title: Where to pick up?
pickup.desc2: and collection points at global warehouses around the clock.
pickup.desc3: For items eligible for fast-lane delivery, choose from multiple time slots based on your location. Orders will be delivered to your door and left in a safe place.
pickup.alert1: England, Scotland and Wales offer delivery for large and heavy items (items requiring two or more people to move, such as sofas and beds), so we can deliver them safely to any location you choose.
pickup.alert2: One of our friendly drivers will contact you the same day to discuss delivery details. If you are self-isolating, please let us know so we can reschedule your delivery.
pickup.warning: We currently have high demand for large-item deliveries. If your delivery is delayed, we will notify you as soon as possible. We are working hard to provide the best service to our customers — thank you for your patience and support.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What if I order large and small items at the same time?
faq.a1_1: The fastest way to get them to you is to ship them separately.
faq.a1_2: Don't worry; you only pay shipping once.
faq.a1_3: Please check your order confirmation email for more details.
faq.q2: What if I'm not at home?
faq.a2_1: Small items will be left in a safe place, out of sight, or handed to a neighbor at your request.
faq.a2_3: will contact you to reschedule delivery and choose the most convenient date and time slot!
faq.q3: How many people deliver large items?
faq.a3_1: Large items such as sofas and freezers may
faq.a3_3: . Our friendly driver will contact you on the delivery day and deliver your order safely to the chosen location.
faq.a4_1: We continue to deliver many items, including preorders for game consoles. You will receive SMS notifications and the courier's tracking number before delivery.
faq.a4_2: Items will be delivered to a safe area at the door; large items will be delivered to a secure location. One of our friendly drivers will contact you the same day to discuss large-item delivery details. If you are self-isolating, please inform us so we can reschedule your delivery.

header.label: 📜 Privacy Policy
header.title: APP-NAME Privacy Policy
header.desc: Last updated: October 2025 | Protecting your privacy is our top priority

content.welcome: 1.1 Welcome to the APP-NAME store website
content.desc1: APP-NAME takes its responsibilities under applicable privacy laws (the “Privacy Laws”) seriously and is committed to respecting the privacy and concerns of all users of our APP-NAME website and mobile applications (the “Platform”).
content.alert: We recognize the importance of the personal data you entrust to us and believe we have a duty to manage, protect and handle your personal data responsibly.
content.definition: Personal data refers to information about an individual who can be identified from that data or from that data combined with other information the organization has or may have access to.
content.consent: By using the service, you hereby agree to our collection, use, disclosure and processing of your personal data in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

2.title: 2. When does APP-NAME collect personal data?

content.thirdParty: We may also obtain information from third parties (logistics, payment providers, etc.)

3.title: 3. What personal data does APP-NAME collect?
3.warning: You may opt out of data collection at any time, but this may affect certain features.

location.title: Location services
location.note: Can be disabled in device settings at any time

management.title: Management
items: Opt out of personalized ads on mobile

6.title: 6. How do we use the information you provide?
6.unsubscribe: You may unsubscribe from marketing messages at any time

7.title: 7. What data do we retain and how does APP-NAME protect user information?

retention.title: Retention period
retention.desc: We retain data only as long as necessary and delete when conditions are met:

8.title: 8. Does APP-NAME disclose information collected from visitors to external parties?
8.note: We ensure all third parties comply with equivalent data protection standards

footer.contact: If you have questions, contact our Data Protection Officer

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: APP-NAME Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.lastUpdated: Last updated: October 2025 | Protecting your privacy is our top priority
PrivacyPolicyPage.section1_1: 1.1 Welcome to the APP-NAME store website

PrivacyPolicyPage.section1_4: Personal data refers to information that can identify an individual.

ReturnsPolicy.title: I changed my mind
ReturnsPolicy.refundMethod: Refunds will be processed via the original payment method:
ReturnsPolicy.refundUsdtEth: Using USDT or ETH may take one business day to appear in your account
ReturnsPolicy.refundWire: Bank wire refunds may take up to 30 days depending on your bank
ReturnsPolicy.requirements1: Unused and with all original components
ReturnsPolicy.requirements2: In original packaging (if applicable, with tags)
ReturnsPolicy.requirements5: Include any free gifts that came with the product
ReturnsPolicy.productSupportDesc1: In most cases, if you have an issue with an item, you can check our
ReturnsPolicy.productSupportDesc3: from the comfort of your home to see if we can resolve it. There you can access FAQs about products and our company, shipping & pickup, returns and refunds.
ReturnsPolicy.issueNotice1: If you still need to return (within 15 days), we will offer exchange, replacement or refund.
ReturnsPolicy.issueNotice2: After this period, if the product is still under warranty, we will arrange repair through our professional repair agents, or replace the item if it cannot be repaired.
ReturnsPolicy.issueDesc: The fastest return route is via our global warehousing centers in 112 countries/regions. We accept most items except very large items even if they were initially delivered to your door. For large-item returns, start a live chat below or visit our help hotline link.
ReturnsPolicy.precautionsDesc: Some items — such as food, pierced jewelry and underwear — are only eligible for exchange or refund if defective. Our website will indicate which items are non-refundable.
ReturnsPolicy.precautions1: If you return DVDs, music or software products, they must be unused and in original sealed packaging
ReturnsPolicy.precautions2: If the item or packaging is severely damaged, we reserve the right to reduce the refund amount
ReturnsPolicy.precautions3: We may request product serial numbers or similar information to verify the item
ReturnsPolicy.precautions4: This will not affect your consumer rights
ReturnsPolicy.precautionsNote: If we collect your goods, we will inspect them before issuing a refund. Please note that if items are inspected but not returned according to instructions, we reserve the right to refuse a refund or issue a partial refund depending on the condition.
ReturnsPolicy.proof2_2: The email address used to purchase the item

sellerRating.title: Seller rating system
sellerRating.introContent: Here we introduce the seller rating system and how it is generated and used.

section1.title: How to access the seller rating system?
section1.encourage: The seller rating system encourages sellers to maintain high service standards to create a better shopping experience for our buyers.
section1.deduction: Points will be deducted for failure to meet promised targets.

accessPath.prefix: You can view your rating on the [

section2.title: How are ratings generated?
section2.deductionCondition: Points are deducted only when buyer minimum expectations are not met. This also reminds sellers of areas needing improvement.
section2.updateTime: The seller rating system updates scores on the first day of each month based on the seller's violations from the previous month. Click any rating dimension keyword to view the full policy.

nfr.title: Non-fulfillment rate (NFR)
nfr.desc: Orders canceled or returned by seller in the last 7 days account for 30% of total orders

lsr.title: Late shipment rate (LSR)
lsr.desc: Orders delayed by seller over 72 hours in the last 7 days account for 20% of total orders

customerService.title: Customer service
customerService.rude: Rude or abusive chats or comments
customerService.cancelRequests: Requested buyers to cancel orders more than 5 times this month

breach.title: Breach of promise
breach.violatePromise: Seller failed to provide promised services to buyer, harming buyer rights

section3.title: What penalties are associated with certain points?

penalties.freeShippingRemoval: Remove free shipping or shipping discount (28 days)
penalties.listingBlock: Block creation and editing of listings (28 days)

section4.title: Customer service rules and implementation details
section4.rudeQuestion: What is rude or abusive chat/comment?
section4.rudeDefinition: Malicious harassment refers to insulting, cursing, threatening, commenting or otherwise verbally attacking or using improper means to harass another member and infringing on their lawful rights.
section4.rudeHandling: How to handle rude or abusive chats/comments?
section4.rudePenalty: Points will be deducted for general and severe violations of business privileges, management and control.
section4.rudeScenario: Applicable scenarios: Malicious harassment includes insulting, cursing, threatening or other verbal attacks, or using malicious means to harass or infringe the lawful rights of others.

section5.title: Measures applicable to breaches
section5.breachDefinition: A breach means the seller failed to provide services to the buyer, infringed buyer rights, or failed to fulfill obligations promised to APP-NAME. The seller must continue to fulfill statutory or agreed exchanges, returns and refunds.
section5.generalViolation: 1. For general violations where the seller has additional obligations for a paid order or corresponding goods/services, deduct 5 points per violation.

seriousViolation.prefix: 2. For each serious violation of the following commitments, deduct 10 points:
seriousViolation.item1: 1) APP-NAME determines the seller should bear after-sales responsibilities such as refunds, but the seller refuses;
seriousViolation.item2: 2) APP-NAME determines the seller should provide 7-day no-reason returns, but the seller refuses;
seriousViolation.item3: 3) Without buyer-seller agreement, refusing or delaying sending promised trial items;
seriousViolation.item4: 4) Seller fails to process order within 72 hours after payment;
seriousViolation.activity: Sellers participating in official APP-NAME activities who fail to meet activity requirements (excluding shipping time) or violate other APP-NAME published management content (including but not limited to rules, specifications, category management norms, industry standards). Specific provisions apply as appropriate.

duration.suffix: . With corrective actions and improved store performance maintained, sanctioned sellers will regain certain seller privileges.

section7.title: Violation handling
section7.generalDesc: When a consumer files a complaint and APP-NAME finds it justified, general violations deduct 5 points each time. Completing 5 orders can restore 5 points.
section7.seriousDesc: When a consumer files a complaint and APP-NAME finds it justified, serious violations deduct 20 points per item. Completing 20 orders can restore 20 points.
section7.extremeDesc: Account freeze and store closure within 28 days.

example1.title: Example 1: Seller A receives 3 points in week 3 and will have privileges restored in week 7

example2.title: Example 2: Seller B receives 3 points in week 3 and 3 points in week 5. These points accumulate to define the level; privileges will be reclaimed in week 9

example3.title: Example 3: Seller C receives 3 points one week before the new quarter and 3 points after the quarter starts; newly acquired points will redefine the level

appeal.suffix: to appeal. If your appeal is successful, we will cancel your deductions and restore your seller privileges.
